contract_elements_covered: AH1: RecurringPattern.category_id from RecurrenceGroup.mode; subscription override inherit/lookup
AG1: per-component monthly_map; rolling → Variable; recurring due → resolve_bucket via category_id
T1: frozen unit contract — salary+rent, same-day mixed, Variable regression, map_category wiring
D1: retire categorize_delta for monthly bucket path; wire category_names through projection
V1: uat.md + runbook TOML checklist; omniflow probes rows AG/AH after deploy + sync
frozen_boundaries_respected: Rolling daily_rate → Variable (positive and negative) — not Income
US-0015 AI buckets out of scope
US-0013 ML overlay out of scope
No default.toml code expansion — operator TOML on external profile

dependency_review.recommended_order: AH1 → AG1 → T1 → D1 single PR → deploy → manual Full Firefly sync + recompute → operator TOML extend if needed → V1 verify-work
dependency_review.notes: AG1 depends on AH1 for recurring category carry; T1 and D1 depend on AG1; V1 gated on deploy + operator Full sync/recompute + conditional TOML extend before omniflow smoke

test_coverage.unit_tests: T1 frozen contract: AG income > 0, AH fixed_costs > 0, same-day mixed, Variable regression, subscription override category carry, map_category wiring
test_coverage.integration_tests: Optional post-BUG-0006 DB fixture → recompute → monthly API (architecture); not required for plan-verify
test_coverage.operator_tests: V1 GET /api/v1/forecast/monthly + /forecast Monthly tab rows AG/AH; runbook TOML checklist for German/custom labels

coverage.criterion: Monthly forecast API/UI shows non-zero Income for funded account when mirror holds income-category inflows in forecast month — not permanently Income: 0 while categorized rows exist
coverage.notes: AG1 component monthly_map routes salary recurring via category_id → map_category → Income; T1 unit-proves first-month income > 0; V1 operator runtime on financegnome.omniflow.cc; D1 removes net-delta path that zeroed Income; AH1 prerequisite for recurring category resolution

coverage.criterion: Monthly forecast shows non-zero Fixed when mirror holds fixed-cost category outflows — not Fixed: 0 with all spend under Variable only
coverage.notes: AH1 carries category_id on RecurringPattern; AG1 routes recurring due to Fixed via resolve_bucket; D1 retires categorize_delta(None) path that forced Variable; T1 unit-proves fixed_costs > 0; V1 operator verify after sync + optional TOML extend

coverage.criterion: OIDC-enabled and bundled-firefly deploy regression checks pass (acceptance footer)
coverage.notes: V1 uat.md regression footer post-verify; no dedicated dev task — operator verify-work smoke (ADV-1)

advisories.note: Acceptance regression footer (OIDC + bundled-firefly) has no dedicated dev task; operator verify-work post-V1 — not a plan-verify blocker.
Rows AG/AH runtime proof requires operator manual Full Firefly sync + forecast recompute after deploy — V1 blocked until sync per operator gate FULL_FIREFLY_SYNC_RECOMPUTE.
Architecture D1 runbook-only split: sprint D1 adds code cleanup (categorize_delta retire) and V1 carries runbook TOML checklist — aligned enhancement, not a gap.
German/custom Firefly labels (Gehalt, Miete Nebenkosten) may require operator TOML extend under [forecast.category_buckets] — conditional gate TOML_CATEGORY_BUCKETS before V1 pass.
DEC-0067: Income via categorized recurring only — positive rolling residual stays Variable; one-off refunds without recurring detection remain out of AG scope by design.
Variable totals shrink when fixed recurring moves to Fixed — intended DEC-0007 behavior; T1 regression test required.
US-0015 AI bucket mapping and US-0013 ML overlay explicitly out of scope per frozen boundaries.

notes: QA plan-verify 2026-06-06: sprints/quick/Q0014/tasks.md aligns with docs/product/acceptance.md BUG-0012 rows AG/AH and architecture § BUG-0012; 5/5 tasks mapped (AH1, AG1, T1, D1, V1); discovery sub-defects AG/AH covered; no gaps or orphans. Approved for /execute.
